name: Tristana
title: The Megling Gunner
shortBio: - Explosive Shot (E) is a DoT ability

skins.name: Dragon Trainer Tristana

chromas.name: Dragon Trainer Tristana (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2018.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2018.

skins.description: As the dragonslayers fought a bitter war with their nemeses, Tristana was busy with a draconic matter of her own. Deep in the wooded forests, away from the battles, she busily trained a young dragon—a trying task rewarded with lifelong friendship.

skins.name: Little Demon Tristana

chromas.name: Little Demon Tristana (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2019.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive during 2019.

skins.description: A witch who is now one of the great queens of Hell, Tristana commands a vast army of lesser demons and rules the twin Aspects of Ruin and Woe. Mortals attempting to invoke her will find a variety of tempting contracts, but signers beware: Tristana's ultimate goal is bathing her signatories—as well as the world—in hellfire.

skins.name: Hextech Tristana
skins.description: Hex-powered munitions have been around since the early days of hextech innovation, but no one has perfected their use like Tristana. Decorated for her service in protecting the innocent with her Hexcrystal Cannon (Mark III), she stands at the forefront of martial hextechnology as a staunch and noble advocate.

skins.name: Spirit Blossom Tristana

chromas.name: Spirit Blossom Tristana (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Spirit Blossom Tristana (Night Blossom)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2022 event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2022 event.

skins.description: Those who seek glory, or something akin / Little Laughing Luck will greet with a grin / She harbors no favorites, no motives to name / All are equal when playing her game / An unfruitful harvest, the farmers attest / Has no better spirit than her to redress / But steady your hand, or pay a great price / For fortunes can change with a roll of the dice…

skins.name: Classic Tristana
skins.description: Tristana was always the most trigger-happy champion of the launch roster and had the firepower to match. The insane AP ratios on all her abilities made her job even easier. Jump in, apply grievous wounds, Buster Shot, then walk away... because cool Summoners don't look at explosions.

passive.name: Draw a Bead
passive.description: Increases Tristana's attack range as she levels.

spells.name: Rapid Fire
spells.description: Tristana fires her weapon rapidly, increasing her attack speed for a short time.

spells.name: Rocket Jump
spells.description: Tristana fires at the ground to propel herself to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for 3 seconds where she lands.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Tristana fires at the ground to propel herself to target location, dealing @LandingDamage@ magic damage and Slows by 60% for 2.5 seconds when she lands.
On a champion kill or assist, the Cooldown is refreshed.

spells.name: Explosive Shot
spells.description: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies.  Can be activated to deal damage to target unit over time, and reduce healing received.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Enemies explode when slain by Tristana's basic attacks, dealing @PassiveDamage@ magic damage to nearby enemies.

Active: Rends target enemy, applying 50% Grievous Wounds and dealing @ActiveDamageTTOnly@ magic damage over 5 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Buster Shot
spells.description: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals magic damage and knocks the target back.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Tristana fires a massive cannonball at an enemy unit, dealing <magicDamage>@DamageCalc@ magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Knocks</status> surrounding units back @KnockbackDistance@ distance.
